flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Holyoke Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Holyoke Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Holyoke Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 3.6k).
